c74object.name: tap.808.hat~
c74object.digest: TR-808-style hi-hat voice — closed and open, one circuit, hardware choke
c74object.description: The tap.808.hat~ object is a circuit-informed model of the Roland TR-808 hi-hat. On the hardware, closed and open are one circuit sharing one sound source — the bank of six square oscillators every 808 metal voice draws on — so this is one object with two trigger inlets, and the choke works exactly like the hardware: a closed hit terminates a sounding open hat. Trigger with signals (a rising edge fires; the edge's amplitude, 0..1, is the accent) or with messages. The open hat's decay mirrors the panel knob (~90-600 ms); the closed hat is fixed (~50 ms), like the hardware. The tolerance attribute spreads the six oscillators per seed, up to the real ~20% production tolerance — every seed is a different unit off the line. Single-channel: wrap in mc. for a rack of different 808s.

inlet.digest: Closed-hat trigger: rising edge fires; edge amplitude (0..1) is the accent. Chokes a sounding open hat.
Open-hat trigger: rising edge fires; edge amplitude (0..1) is the accent

method.name: signal
method.description: Rising edges trigger sample-accurately: inlet 1 the closed hat (choking any sounding open hat, like the hardware), inlet 2 the open hat. Edge amplitude (0..1) is the accent.

method.name: bang
method.description: Trigger the closed hat at full accent (from the scheduler).

method.name: trigger
method.description: Trigger the closed hat with an accent value (0..1, default 1).

method.name: open
method.description: Trigger the open hat with an accent value (0..1, default 1).

attribute.name: decay
attribute.description: Open-hat decay, 0..1 (default 0.5): the hardware spans roughly 90-600 ms. The closed hat's decay is fixed, like the hardware.

attribute.name: closed_level
attribute.description: Level of the closed path, 0..1 (default 1) — the CH channel's pot.

attribute.name: open_level
attribute.description: Level of the open path, 0..1 (default 1) — the OH channel's pot.

attribute.name: tuning
attribute.digest: Circuit bend: bank pitch ratio (default 1 = stock)
attribute.description: Pitch ratio of the six-oscillator bank, 0.25..4.

attribute.name: tolerance
attribute.description: Spread of the six oscillator frequencies, 0..1: 1 is the full ~20% production tolerance — the reason no two 808s' metal voices match. Deterministic per seed.

attribute.name: seed
attribute.digest: Unit identity for the tolerance spread
attribute.description: Seed (>= 1); each seed is a different unit off the line.
